steps.title: Set up the ticket count equation
steps.content: The aquarium sold a total of 300 tickets. With $s$ standard tickets and $p$ premium tickets: $$s + p = 300$$

steps.title: Set up the revenue equation and identify the system
steps.content: Standard tickets cost 6 dollars and premium tickets cost 14 dollars. With 3,120 dollars total revenue: $$6s + 14p = 3,120$$ Our derived system, $s + p = 300$ and $6s + 14p = 3,120$, matches the correct answer: A is correct.
